name: Blueberry Liqueur
recipeInstructions: Note: Blueberries can be purchased in season from May to September. Avoid baskets with discolored berries and do not rinse until ready to use. If freezing before using, freeze first. Rinse berries gently with cold water and lightly crush them. Add vodka, lemon peel, and clove. Pour the mixture into a dark bottle and store for 3-4 months. Strain through dampened cheesecloth, squeezing out as much liquid as possible. Add sugar syrup to taste and store another 4 weeks. The liqueur may be watery; add glycerin if a thicker consistency is desired. Suitable for baking. Store in a wide-mouth quart jar.
